coreIssue: This senior backend engineer check-in is mainly about clarifying Priya’s next-quarter ownership before the billing rewrite lands and reshapes her plans.
openingQuestion: What are you hoping to own next quarter, and where does mentoring fit into that picture after this launch?
listenFor: whether she names a specific area, project, or decision she expects to own next quarter
whether she volunteers a concrete reason for being quieter this week or pivots quickly back to delivery details
whether she brings up a named person, team, or situation when describing the mentoring thread that stalled
avoid: do not treat her quieter week as a problem to solve before you know whether it is normal post-launch decompression
do not pitch the billing rewrite as a done deal before you hear what ownership and growth she is already aiming for
goodOutcome: You and Priya have agreed what senior-level ownership she wants next quarter and whether mentoring is part of that scope before you position the billing rewrite.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example from the Monday launch that shows her impact so you can use it to bridge into ownership and mentoring.
